category_sources: source_facts.description says portable CVS repository synchronization utility; official homepage says CVSync is a portable CVS repository synchronization utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cvsync; official homepage title is CVSync.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes recipes, FAQ, and manual pages for cvsync commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage states all CVSync is available at GitHub and links to github.com/cvsync/cvsync.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify CVS repository synchronization and mirroring utilities; official homepage confirms scope.
